rationale.fidelity: Correctly diagnoses the objective mismatch and restores monetary travel cost without treating emissions as modeled.
rationale.managerial_framing: Maps the planner, routing choices, constraints, mechanism, stakes, and feasible-plan counterfactual concretely.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Avoids an unjustified sustainability contribution but supplies no traceable literature positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels emissions and sustainability claims unsupported and states what additional model content and evidence would be required.
rationale.prose_clarity: Structured and understandable but much longer than necessary, with frequent encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A substantively complete repair with strong model and evidence discipline; its template-heavy prose reduces clarity.
